business.full_name: James F. Dicke College of Business Administration

programs.name: Accounting: MSA
programs.notes: Master of Science in Accounting; can be completed in 5 years via Express Path

programs.name: International Business
programs.notes: Minor offered within College of Business

engineering.notes: Optional 5-year co-op program available for all engineering majors

programs.name: Computer Science + X (CS+X)
programs.notes: Flexible dual-focus degree pairing CS with another discipline of the student's choice

programs.name: Engineering Exploratory
programs.notes: For students deciding among engineering disciplines in their first year

law.full_name: Claude W. Pettit College of Law

programs.name: Law – Pre-Law / 3+3
programs.notes: Accelerated 3+3 program: 3 years undergrad + 3 years law school. Available combined with: Business, Chemistry, Criminal Justice, History, Literature, Political Science, Politics, Psychology, Theatre, and more

all_graduate_programs: Accounting: MSA (Master of Science in Accounting)
